raw:
{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging a potential citation error and removing specifics until verification.",
    "R1.4": "The agent named prior works but did not map against multiple nearest works, only identifying some delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged one missing or wrong citation and suggested verifying others, indicating some engagement with citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marked uncertainty for several claims and softened overconfident statements, addressing uncertainty effectively.",
    "RX.3": "The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identified harmful patterns and avoided introducing new errors or harm.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not, indicating partial traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging a potential citation error and removing specifics until verification.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named prior works but did not map against multiple nearest works, only identifying some delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged one missing or wrong citation and suggested verifying others, indicating some engagement with citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked uncertainty for several claims and softened overconfident statements, addressing uncertainty effectively.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified harmful patterns and avoided introducing new errors or harm.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not, indicating partial traceability.
